Introducing Sorro

The operating system for creative work.

Sorro brings people, projects, assets, knowledge and intelligent workflows together so creators, teams and businesses can move from idea to delivery with clarity and confidence.

Launch app preview Explore the vision
Reduce mental load People create. AI works. Everything has a home
Sorro OS
Mission Control Workspaces Projects People Assets Knowledge CORE
Mission Control

Good Morning, Cristian.

Everything is ready.

Today's Focus 3 priorities

Website review, creator application, Discord setup.

Continue Working Sorro

72% ready

CORE Briefing I've prepared today's priorities.

Two creators need approval. One client is waiting for feedback. Everything else is on schedule.

The promise

Less chaos. More clarity.

Sorro exists to reduce the mental load of creative work. It is designed to make users feel calm, organised, confident and in control from the moment they open it.

Mission Control

One calm home screen showing what matters today, what changed, and what needs attention.

Workspace Engine

Create a workspace by answering a few simple questions. Sorro builds the structure for you.

Projects & Tasks

Simple, focused project management built around momentum, clarity and delivery.

People & Teams

Manage creators, freelancers, clients, staff and collaborators with clean roles and access.

Assets & Knowledge

Files, notes, guides, briefs, decisions and brand assets live where they belong.

Discord Integration

Private creator hubs, tickets, roles and workspaces can be created automatically.

Powered by CORE

AI should never create work. It should work.

CORE quietly organises, summarises, prepares and connects the work around your work. It helps clients, creators and teams move from A to B faster, cleaner and with more confidence.

CORE Briefing

  • Meeting notes prepared
  • Assets organised
  • Tasks suggested
  • Team updates ready

Early access

Sorro is now in active development.

Join the early access list, discuss a creator workspace, or follow the build.
